creator: scheidell@secnap.net
text:
amavisd 2.6.2 fixes a dkim signing issue when adding disclaimers.
Other minor bugs.

see: http://www.ijs.si/software/amavisd/release-notes.txt

Fix: files/patch-amavisd patch can be removed.. functionality is included in 2.6.2.
patches for Makefile and distinfo.
patch below assumes blank patch-amavisd for completeness.

nothing else needed to be changed.

(I can't upload a patch file, for some reason, from firefox/macos, your detector doesn't see a text file as a text file)
How-To-Repeat: dkim signed emails from microsoft outlook might contain an extra \r which breaks dkim signing.
